title: BUbuisnessAndMarket
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbuisnessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Visa CMO: AI agents are your new customers — here’s how to sell to them
items.description: As AI takes over consumer decision-making, companies must rethink everything from product data to brand purpose — or risk being invisible.

items.title: Federal appeals court blocks California law requiring federal agents to wear badges or ID because it ‘attempts to directly regulate the U.S.’
items.description: The three-judge panel said the law violated the Constitution. California lawyers say the law applied evenly to all law enforcement officers.

items.title: Cursor’s 25-year-old CEO is a former Google intern who just inked a $60 billion deal with SpaceX
items.description: From Google intern at 18 to a billionaire at 25, Cursor CEO Michael Truell's rise is one of Silicon Valley's fastest.

items.title: David’s Bridal exec has a warning for every CEO obsessed with AI’s return-on-investment
items.description: David's Bridal CBO Elina Vilk says companies chasing a discrete AI return-on-investment are asking the wrong question—and missing the real opportunity...

items.title: Best Buy CEO Corie Barry is stepping down: How she went from architect of a comeback to cautionary tale
items.description: Shares are up only 6% since she was appointed in 2019, vastly underperforming the S&P 500.
